# Visit Florence, CO — llms.txt
# Florence, Colorado Tourism Directory

## About
Visit Florence, CO is the official tourism directory for Florence, Colorado — the Antique Capital of Colorado. Florence is the closest town to the Royal Gorge, just 15 minutes away.

## Key Facts
- Location: Florence, CO 81226, Fremont County, Colorado
- Nickname: Antique Capital of Colorado
- Distance to Royal Gorge: 15 minutes
- Distance to Cañon City: 15 minutes  
- Distance to Pueblo: 45 minutes
- Distance to Colorado Springs: 75 minutes

## Directory Categories
- Antiques: 100+ antique shops, dealers, and galleries in downtown Florence
- Breweries: Florence Brewing Company and local craft breweries
- Restaurants: Local dining from family-owned cafes to full-service restaurants
- Activities: Outdoor recreation, hiking, Arkansas River, Gold Belt Tour Scenic Byway
- Events: Community events, antique shows, festivals

## Sister Sites (Epic Adventures Network)
- Royal Gorge Rafting: https://royalgorgerafting.net — Class III-V whitewater rafting
- Royal Gorge Zipline Tours: https://royalgorgeziplinetours.com — Gorge-spanning zipline
- Royal Gorge Vacation Rentals: https://royalgorgevacationrentals.com — Yurts and glamping
- Royal Gorge Epic Adventures: https://royalgorgeepicadventures.com — Multi-activity packages
- Whitewater Bar & Grill: https://whitewaterbar.com — Riverside dining and live music
- Rooftop Social: https://wwrooftopsocial.com — Rooftop bar in Canon City
- The Edge Zipline: https://theedgezip.com — Sky-high zip experiences

## Business Listing Plans
- Free: Basic listing with name, address, description
- Premium ($99/month): Full listing with gallery, menu, booking link, enhanced SEO
- Sponsored ($199/month): Featured placement, homepage spotlight, banner ads

## Contact
- Add your business: https://visitflorence.co/add-listing
- Request a listing: https://visitflorence.co/request-listing
